changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.13
changeSet.comment: Create t1 schema (separate from nexus schema to isolate ephemeral T1 from durable T2)
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS t1
changeSet.rollback: DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS t1 CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.13
changeSet.comment: Create UNLOGGED t1.scratch table — ephemeral session working memory
changeSet.sql:
CREATE UNLOGGED TABLE t1.scratch ( id TEXT NOT NULL, tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, session_id TEXT NOT NULL, content TEXT NOT NULL, tags TEXT, flagged BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, flush_project TEXT, flush_title TEXT, agent TEXT, access_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, last_accessed TIMESTAMPTZ, ts TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT scratch_pk PRIMARY KEY (id) );
-- Lookups by session (most common query pattern) CREATE INDEX idx_scratch_tenant_session ON t1.scratch (tenant_id, session_id); -- TTL sweep index: WHERE ts < now() - interval 'X hours' CREATE INDEX idx_scratch_ts ON t1.scratch (ts);
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1.scratch CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.13
changeSet.comment: Enable and force RLS on t1.scratch; tenant isolation via nexus.t1_tenant GUC

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.13
changeSet.comment: Add FTS generated tsvector column for keyword search. BEHAVIOR CHANGE: T1 scratch search was vector-semantic (ChromaDB ONNX). PG backend has no pgvector; search becomes FTS. See changeset comment. Weights: content 'B' english (prose, stemmed); tags 'C' simple (identifiers). Query: OR'd plainto_tsquery('english',q) OR plainto_tsquery('simple',q) — same OR-query pattern as T2 memory/plans (152-FTS-tokenizer-DECISION).
changeSet.rollback: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS t1.idx_scratch_fts; ALTER TABLE t1.scratch DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS fts_vector;

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.13
changeSet.comment: Grant t1.scratch privileges to nexus_svc role. Also sets search_path to include t1 so the service role can access both nexus (T2) and t1 (T1) schemas without qualification. Idempotent: IF EXISTS guard skips gracefully when role absent.
